name: Chocolate Chip Bread (Abm)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine yeast and water in a mixing bowl; stir until dissolved.
2. Mix flour, salt, sugars, and milk with butter in another bowl.
3. Add the wet ingredients to the dry mixture; stir until combined.
4. Shape dough into loaf form.
5. Place dough in bread machine pan or lined baking dish.
6. Follow your machine's settings for basic bread making.
7. If using a light cycle, set temperature accordingly; otherwise use normal setting.
8. Add chocolate chips at the appropriate time as specified by your machine.
9. Bake until done (machine will beep when finished).
10. Let cool before slicing.
